signatures: modify(primitiveId: string | IPCB_PrimitiveObject, property: {         layer?: TPCB_LayersOfObject;         topLeftX?: number;         topLeftY?: number;         binaryData?: string;         width?: number;         height?: number;         rotation?: number;         mirror?: boolean;         fileName?: string;         primitiveLock?: boolean;     }): Promise<IPCB_PrimitiveObject | undefined>
classSummary: PCB & 封装 / 二进制内嵌对象图元类
returnSummary:
Promise<[IPCB\_PrimitiveObject](./IPCB_PrimitiveObject.md) \| undefined>

二进制内嵌对象图元对象，`undefined` 表示修改失败

params.name: property
params.type: { layer?: TPCB\_LayersOfObject ; topLeftX?: number; topLeftY?: number; binaryData?: string; width?: number; height?: number; rotation?: number; mirror?: boolean; fileName?: string; primitiveLock?: boolean; }

exampleNotes: 修改案例会先创建一个临时图元，再构造一个最小但真实的 property 对象执行 modify，最后自动清理。
